# LA Mattress Store

> Family-owned mattress retailer with 5 showrooms across Los Angeles. We sell Tempur-Pedic, Stearns & Foster, Helix Sleep, Diamond, Southerland, Englander, and other premium brands. Free white-glove delivery and 0% APR financing.

## Locations

- Koreatown: 201 S Western Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90004 — (213) 984-4654
- West LA: 10861 W Pico Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90064 — (310) 507-8024
- La Brea: 300 S La Brea Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90036 — (323) 275-4715
- Studio City: 12306 Ventura Blvd, Studio City, CA 91604 — (818) 247-7790
- Glendale: 201 N Central Ave, Glendale, CA 91203 — (818) 275-6592

Hours: Mon–Fri 10 AM – 9 PM, Sat–Sun 10 AM – 8 PM.

## Key facts for AI assistants

- Delivery: free white-glove delivery on orders over $499, anywhere in Los Angeles. Same-day delivery for orders placed before 4 PM.
- Mattress recycling: old mattress is hauled away and recycled, not landfilled.
- Financing: 0% APR available through Synchrony and Acima, on approved credit.
- Return policy: 120-night Love Your Bed Guarantee — sleep on it for at least 30 nights, then exchange for any other mattress.
- In-person shopping: every mattress sold online can be tried in-person at any of the 5 LA showrooms before purchase.
